Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A person in all-white clothing executes a high, acrobatic kick in the center of a hall, suspended mid-air before descending rapidly. [2-6] The figure lands and transitions to a standing position on the right, joining a stationary semi-circle of spectators in white uniforms; some hold instruments near a blue banner on the left wall while the central grey floor remains empty. [6-10] A person in white enters from the right, blurred by movement, and performs a handspring or flip across the center, appearing inverted with hands touching the floor before moving out of frame. [10-12] The central grey floor is empty again as the group of observers in white remains stationary along the perimeter under overhead lights. [12-16] A person enters from the bottom left while a man in a white t-shirt and trousers claps in the foreground left. A semi-circle of individuals in white uniforms stands stationary along the back wall near a blue banner, holding instruments under bright overhead lights. [16-20] A child in white clothing performs an acrobatic flip in the foreground, landing as another individual executes a high spinning kick in the center-right. The surrounding group observes the movement. [20-24] A participant in white clothing

[54-56] A person in white clothing stands on the left grey floor facing right, while observers in white uniforms line the back wall near a blue banner. [56-60] The individual performs a high acrobatic kick on the right, rotating vertically before landing in a low crouch with hands near the ground. [60-64] After holding the crouch, the person rises to stand upright facing right with an arm raised. [64-68] They then drop into a low lunge facing left and transition into an inverted maneuver, placing hands on the floor with legs extended upward.

[68-72] A person in white clothing performs inverted acrobatic maneuvers and a handstand in the center of the grey floor. [72-76] An individual executes a high vertical kick on the center-left while a person in the foreground left bends forward and moves rapidly past the camera, obscuring the view. [76-82] Once clear, a person in white stands centrally, bends into a low stance, shifts left, and performs a high spinning kick. Throughout, a semi-circle of observers in white uniforms remains stationary along the back wall near a blue banner under bright overhead lights.

[82-86] A person in a white shirt with a green graphic stands foreground left while a participant in white executes low movements, transitioning from a low stance background right to crouching center-left. Observers in white uniforms stand stationary along the back wall near a blue banner. [86-92] The camera shifts downward, focusing on the smooth grey floor and obscuring the group, capturing only overhead light reflections and briefly feet of an individual in white trousers top right. [92-96] The camera lifts to reveal a person in white performing an inverted acrobatic move center before transitioning to a low crouch, while musicians and observers in white uniforms continue standing in a semi-circle along the back wall.

[96-100] A participant in white transitions from a low sweep on the smooth grey floor to a standing left-leg kick, settling into a wide, low stance facing right. Observers in white uniforms stand stationary along the back wall near a blue banner, clapping under bright overhead lights.
[100-104] The participant shifts to a low forward-bending posture with hands near the floor, then rises to a standing position on the left side. Observers remain stationary near the banner.
[104-108] A participant in white clothing executes a high spinning kick center-right while an individual observes on the left. The kicker lands into a lower stance. Observers remain stationary.
[108-110] The participant stands on the right facing left with legs spread. Observers along the back wall continue clapping near the blue banner.

recent_thinks: [110-112] A participant in white clothing on the right executes a high kick, blurring with motion. Another individual stands observing on the left. The semi-circle of observers in white uniforms along the back wall continues to clap near the blue banner under bright overhead lights.

queries.question: What colors describe the background of the large banner seen between 10-12s? A. Blue and white B. Blue and green C. White and black D. Light-grey

answers.text: B

samples.output: <think>A participant in white clothing performs an inverted acrobatic maneuver, placing hands on the smooth grey floor while legs swing overhead. They land in a low crouch facing left. An observer stands on the left watching. The semi-circle of people in white uniforms along the back wall continues clapping near the blue banner.</think><answer></answer>

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
